title: run-story output data
description:
The ordered timeline + its fingerprint + honest omission counts.

``story_sha`` is a deterministic fingerprint over the canonical JSON of the
WINDOWED story (header + events + counts), so it can never be passed off as
covering events a window dropped. ``total_events`` is the full count before
windowing; ``omitted_count`` is what a window dropped.

run_ids.description: The run id(s) the timeline covers (one, or a lineage chain).
run_ids.title: Run Ids

story_sha.description: sha256 fingerprint over the windowed canonical JSON.
story_sha.title: Story Sha

markdown.description: The code-rendered markdown timeline (empty when not requested).
markdown.title: Markdown

total_events.description: Full event count before any window (>= len(events)).
total_events.title: Total Events

omitted_count.description: Events a window dropped — a rendered, countable fact (never silent).
omitted_count.title: Omitted Count

RunStoryEvent.description:
One typed, attributed timeline entry (the D3 event model).

Every field is IDENTITY / ORDERING / COUNTING — never domain semantics.
``evidence`` carries sha pointers + counts only; ``text`` is the human's
verbatim words (a nudge response, an unlock reason) or ``""``.

ts.description: Recorded ISO-8601 timestamp verbatim, or '' when absent.
ts.title: Ts

stream.description: The source-store noun the event came from.
stream.title: Stream

subject_id.description: run_id / scope tag / audit section — opaque identity.
subject_id.title: Subject Id

evidence.description: Sha pointers + counts only (never a metric value).
evidence.title: Evidence

text.description: The human's verbatim words when the record carries any, else ''.
text.title: Text

RunStoryEvent.title: run-story event
